column1: 2 ^ ¿~Nonne Deō subjecta erit anima mea~? Ab ipsō enim salūtāre meum. ^ Shall not my soul be subject to God~? For from him is my salvation.
3 ^ Nam et ipse Deus meus et salūtāris meus~; susceptor meus
column2: non movēbor amplius. ^ For he is my God and my saviour~; he is my protector
column3: I shall be moved no more.

column1: 4 ^ ¿~Quousque irruitis in hominem~? Interficitis ūniversī vōs
column2: tamquam parietī inclīnātō et māceriae dēpulsae. ^ How long do you rush in upon a man~? You all kill
column3: as if you were thrusting down a leaning wall and a tottering fence.

column1: 5 ^ Vērumtamen pretium meum cōgitāvērunt repellere~; cucurrī in sitī~; ōre suō benedīcēbant
column2: et corde suō maledīcēbant. ^ But they have thought to cast away my price~; I ran in thirst~; they blessed with their mouth

column3: quoniam ab ipsō patientia mea~; ^ But truly be thou subject to God
column5: for from him is my patience.

column1: 7 ^ quia ipse Deus meus et salvātor meus
column2: adjūtor meus~; non ēmigrābō. ^ For he is my God and my saviour
column3: my helper~; I shall not be moved.

column1: 8 ^ In Deō salūtāre meum et glōria mea~; Deus auxiliī meī
column2: et spēs mea in Deō est. ^ In God is my salvation and my glory~; he is the God of my help
column3: and my hope is in God.

column2: omnis congregātiō populī~; effundite cōram illō corda vestra~; Deus adjūtor noster in aeternum. ^ Trust in him
column3: all ye congregation of people~; pour out your hearts before him~; God is our helper for ever.
ut dēcipiant ipsī dē vānitāte in idipsum. ^ But vain are the sons of men
column4: the sons of men are liars in the balances
column5: that by vanity they may together deceive.

column2: et rapīnās nōlīte concupīscere~; dīvitiae sī affluant
column3: nōlīte cor appōnere. ^ Trust not in iniquity
column4: and covet not robberies~; if riches abound
column5: set not your heart upon them.
these two things have I heard

column3: misericordiā~; quia tū reddēs ūnīcuique juxtā opera sua. ^ And to thee
column5: mercy~; for thou wilt render to every man according to his works.
